name: Bitcoin Is For Women
description: Barbie was for girls. Bitcoin is for women. This design marks the shift from fantasy to financial sovereignty. It's a call to grow out of the roles we were handed—and into the power we choose.
longDescription:
For too long, women have been told that money is not their domain. That husbands, banks, or governments know best. But true freedom begins with owning your own wealth.

This isn't just a slogan — it's a statement. About maturity. About responsibility. About liberation.

Bitcoin is not just for tech bros. It's for women who refuse to ask for permission.

Soft, conscious, and built to last. Crafted from combed cotton in organic conversion, this fitted t-shirt combines comfort, sustainability, and long-term quality. A premium weight of 180 g/m² ensures a high-quality feel and long-lasting resistance. The tubular cut offers a close, comfortable fit with twin-needle topstitching, tone-on-tone neck tape, and double-needle hems.

name: Perception vs. Reality
description: They told you Bitcoin was just another crypto. In truth, crypto is just fiat 2.0 — printed at will, seized on demand, censored at whim. Bitcoin stands apart: fixed supply, true ownership, unstoppable network.
longDescription:
Stating what others prefer to silence — that Bitcoin stands alone, while fiat and crypto walk the same path — is a quiet provocation.

Some will scoff. Some will ask.

Either way, the message is clear: there is only one path to freedom. Bitcoin.

Soft, conscious, and built to last. Crafted from combed cotton in organic conversion. Solid colors are 100% cotton; Wine Heather and Cloudy Blue Heather include a touch of polyester for a soft heathered finish. Premium weight 180 g/m². Tubular cut, round neckline with twin-needle topstitching, tone-on-tone neck tape.

name: I Don't Have Time
description: Satoshi's words weren't just a brush-off — they were a stance. A reminder to walk your path, with or without applause. Conviction without compromise. Creation without permission.
longDescription:
This design pays tribute to that unwavering vision. To the quiet power of building in the shadows. Of holding the line even when no one else sees the end.

You believe. You build. And with Orange Peel, you wear it.

Part of our Wizards collection — where signal hides in plain sight. No logos. No labels. Just a message for those who know.

Soft, conscious, and built to last. Crafted from combed cotton in organic conversion. Solid colors 100% cotton; Cloudy Blue Heather includes a touch of polyester. 180 g/m² premium weight. Tubular cut with round neckline, twin-needle topstitching, tone-on-tone neck tape.

name: Majin Maximalist
description: You embrace your convictions — your maxi side. Some might even call you toxic. Like the Majin mark — you're not here to educate. Not here to please. You're here to defend Bitcoin's integrity.
longDescription:
Like the Majin mark — Babidi's emblem, stripped of fake kindness and hollow consensus — it unleashes.

You're not here to educate. Not here to please.
You're here to defend Bitcoin's integrity. Against dilution. Against co-option. Against noise.

Toxic? Maxi? Yes please.
It's an immune response to human stupidity and dangerous compromise.

Wear the Majin. Unleash the Maxi.

Soft, conscious, and built to last. Crafted from combed cotton in organic conversion, 180 g/m² premium weight. All colors from farms in certified transition to organic farming.

name: Majin Maxi
description: You embrace your convictions — your maxi side. Some might even call you toxic. Like the Majin mark, you're not here to educate. You're here to defend Bitcoin's integrity. Against dilution. Against noise.
longDescription:
There's a difference between Maxi and Maximalist. One is a stance. The other is a uniform.

The Majin Maxi wears both.

Against dilution. Against co-option. Against noise.

Toxic? Yes please. It's an immune response.

Soft, conscious, and built to last. Crafted from combed cotton in organic conversion, 180 g/m² premium weight. Tubular cut, round neckline with twin-needle topstitching, tone-on-tone neck tape, double-needle hems.

name: Meme Chad — Heart
description: This isn't just a meme. It's your unfailing mindset. You've done the work. You didn't trust — you verified. Unshaken by FUD. Immune to hype. One of the Bitcoin Chads.
longDescription:
You've done the work.
You didn't trust — you verified.

You walk:
— Unshaken by FUD
— Immune to hype
— Locked on the long game
— Ungovernable

You are one of the Bitcoin Chads.
